examples: <sqf>west setFriend [resistance, 0]; // west will not like resistance from now on</sqf>

<sqf>
resistance setFriend [east, 0];
east setFriend [resistance, 0]; // both are enemies

resistance setFriend [east, 1];
east setFriend [resistance, 0]; // resistance likes east, but east does not like resistance
</sqf>
<sqf>west setFriend [west, 0]; // free for all deathmatch! works with west/blufor, east/opfor, independent/resistance and civilian</sqf>
name: setFriend

Item.desc: a value smaller than 0.6 results in being enemy, otherwise ''side1'' is friendly to ''side2''
Item.name: value
